headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make real progress on the generated evaluations (no ground truth) design doc before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integrations so tomorrow's brief has real data
quick_wins.why: Both connectors are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Only active ticket on your board; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR. Next bi-weekly TR likely April 1 — get a reviewable draft out before then.

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock TR page for evals, Flow, and Autopilot updates to align your design doc with current direction
must_make_progress.why: Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk and evals adoption is a tracked metric — your doc should address both

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on how 'no ground truth' evals interact with DeepRAG and validation patterns he's scoping
Get technical input or review commitment on the generated evals approach for AE-1079
Coordinate on any overlap between skills documentation and eval framework definitions

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 generated evaluations design doc progress
must_report_status.note: Have a shareable draft or outline ready before the next bi-weekly TR (~April 1)

flags: Salesforce integration is down (missing simple_salesforce module) — no visibility into customer escalations.
Snowflake integration is down (missing connector) — no product telemetry or funnel metrics available.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock TR — monitor for impact on your evals workstream.
March telemetry data noted as needing update on the TR page — if you own any of that, get it refreshed before month-end.
slack_summary: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — best day to push hard on AE-1079 (generated evaluations, no ground truth design doc), the only active ticket on your board and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: fix the broken Salesforce and Snowflake integrations so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
